sources.title: Current Status
sources.content: Applies to: Monday, May 25, 2026 · Federal agencies in the Washington, DC area are Open. Employees are expected to begin the workday on time. Normal operating procedures are in effect.

sources.title: Ebola disease outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda
sources.content: As of 26 May 2026, the outbreak of Ebola disease caused by Bundibugyo virus has affected the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) and Uganda, with increasing numbers of confirmed and suspected cases and deaths.

sources.title: Current DEFCON Level 2026 | Today's Alert Status | Defcon Level
sources.content: The geopolitical conditions driving the current assessment have coincided with elevated state-sponsored cyber activity. CISA maintains active advisories for critical infrastructure as of May 2026.
